'''dhasupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidradenitis|hidradenitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidradenitis|hidradenitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhasupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsipith|dhæsipith]] || [[word:dhæsipij|dhæsipij]] || [[word:dhæsipish|dhæsipish]] || [[word:dhæsipi|dhæsipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasusuputh|dhasusuputh]] || [[word:dhasusupuj|dhasusupuj]] || [[word:dhasusupush|dhasusupush]] || [[word:dhasusupu|dhasusupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasuputh|dhasuputh]] || [[word:dhasupuj|dhasupuj]] || [[word:dhasupush|dhasupush]] || [[word:dhasupu|dhasupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasufpufth|dhasufpufth]] || [[word:dhasufpufj|dhasufpufj]] || [[word:dhasufpufsh|dhasufpufsh]] || [[word:dhasufpuf|dhasufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasuputhu|dhasuputhu]] || [[word:dhasupuju|dhasupuju]] || [[word:dhasupushu|dhasupushu]] || [[word:dhasupuku|dhasupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasuputh|dhasuputh]] || [[word:dhasupuj|dhasupuj]] || [[word:dhasupush|dhasupush]] || [[word:dhasupu|dhasupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasuputhul|dhasuputhul]] || [[word:dhasupujul|dhasupujul]] || [[word:dhasupushul|dhasupushul]] || [[word:dhasupukul|dhasupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasupuuthuthu|dhasupuuthuthu]] || [[word:dhasupuujuju|dhasupuujuju]] || [[word:dhasupuushushu|dhasupuushushu]] || [[word:dhasupuuku|dhasupuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasuputhun|dhasuputhun]] || [[word:dhasupujun|dhasupujun]] || [[word:dhasupushun|dhasupushun]] || [[word:dhasupukun|dhasupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasuputhuoro|dhasuputhuoro]] || [[word:dhasupujuoro|dhasupujuoro]] || [[word:dhasupushuoro|dhasupushuoro]] || [[word:dhasupukuoro|dhasupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]

{{wordpage|c579b50}}
